title: Principal / Senior Physiotherapist
description:
Are you looking to propel your physiotherapy career? You might be the right fit!

Principal / Senior Physiotherapist

📍 Multiple Locations, Singapore

🏥 Heartland Rehab Pte. Ltd.

💰 Competitive remuneration (commensurate with experience)

Heartland Rehab is seeking an experienced Principal / Senior Physiotherapist to join our growing multidisciplinary rehabilitation group. This role is suited for a clinician who demonstrates strong clinical leadership, sound clinical reasoning, and a commitment to developing people, systems, and standards of care.

Role Overview

You will manage a complex caseload while playing a key role in mentoring junior clinicians, shaping clinical standards, and contributing to service development across the group. The position offers a balance of hands-on clinical work, leadership, and professional growth.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assess, diagnose, and manage a broad range of musculoskeletal and orthopaedic conditions

  • Deliver evidence-based physiotherapy interventions tailored to individual patient needs

  • Manage complex or high-value cases and provide clinical oversight when required

  • Mentor and support junior physiotherapists through supervision, case discussions, and in-service training

  • Contribute to the development and implementation of clinical protocols and best practices

  • Collaborate closely with doctors and allied health professionals to optimise patient outcomes

  • Maintain accurate and compliant clinical documentation in line with clinic standards

Requirements

  • Degree or equivalent qualification in Physiotherapy

  • Minimum 5–7 years of relevant clinical experience

  • Strong clinical reasoning, communication, and leadership skills

  • Ability to work independently while contributing to a collaborative team environment

  • Prior experience in mentoring, supervision, or leadership roles is highly advantageous

Why Join Heartland Rehab

  • Established and reputable physiotherapy group with multiple locations

  • Strong emphasis on clinical excellence, mentorship, and professional development

  • Supportive, team-based culture with clear clinical progression pathways

  • Competitive remuneration and opportunities to take on senior or leadership responsibilities

Salary:

  • Comfortable base pay + tiered commission incentive

Benefits:

  • Work with a dynamic and experienced team
  • Access to a fully furnished gym based setting for rehabilitation
  • Rare few clinics to invest in the latest physiotherapy technology (full set of KINVENT dynamometers, Blood flow restriction therapy, Shockwave therapy, Dry needling,...)
  • Annual training funds up to $1000 available
  • Dedicated mentorship for all staff (internal and international mentors available)
  • Monthly inservice training sessions across clinics
  • Professional development & education Flexibility in work scheduling
  • Opportunity to work closely with Doctors, sports teams and others
  • Opportunity to be part of a teaching faculty (eg. Dry needling, talks through the Health Promotion Board (HPB),...)
  • Professional indemnity insurance
  • Supporting personal goals and interests
  • Medical Benefits

Company values:

  • Family Oriented
  • Transparency
  • Trust
  • Service excellence
  • Getting it done

Interested candidates can apply to jobs@heartlandrehab.sg along with your CV. Subjected to three rounds of interview. Looking for someone who is clinically sound and culturally cohesive.
